summary: Iteration 22 - Certificate Designer Bug Fixes & New Features testing complete. All backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and frontend UI functionality verified. Key fixes: 1) Text content now uses textarea for multi-line editing, 2) PDF text rendering uses Paragraph with wrapping, 3) Added opacity slider (10-100%), 4) Added zoom controls (+/-/reset), 5) Added plan linking dropdown with 4 membership types, 6) Template cards show 'Linked: {plan} Plan' badge.
critical_code_review_comments: CertificateDesigner.jsx: Text content property now uses <textarea> with minHeight 60px and resize:vertical for multi-line editing
CertificateDesigner.jsx: Canvas text elements use pre-wrap and word-break:break-word for proper text wrapping
CertificateDesigner.jsx: Opacity property added with range slider (10-100%) and applied via CSS opacity
CertificateDesigner.jsx: Zoom controls (+/-/reset) with scale range 0.3-1.5, displayed as percentage
CertificateDesigner.jsx: Link Plan dropdown with 5 options (Not Linked, Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, International)
CertificateDesigner.jsx: handleLinkPlan calls PUT /link-plan endpoint and shows toast notification
CertificatesAdmin.jsx: Template cards show 'Linked: {plan} Plan' badge when linked_membership_type is set
Backend server.py: generate_template_pdf uses reportlab Paragraph with ParagraphStyle for text wrapping
Backend server.py: PUT /link-plan endpoint unlinks existing template for plan before linking new one
Backend server.py: GET /by-plan/{type} returns template linked to specific membership type
seed_data_creation: Test templates created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certificate Designer module fully functional with bug fixes and new features. Key features tested: 1) Textarea for multi-line text content editing, 2) Opacity slider (10-100%) in properties panel, 3) Zoom controls (+/-/reset) in toolbar, 4) Link Plan dropdown to assign template to membership type (academic/entrepreneur/corporate/international), 5) Template cards show 'Linked: {plan} Plan' badge, 6) PDF generation uses Paragraph for text wrapping. All CRUD operations, preview, clone, generate-member, generate-event endpoints working.

backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/certificate-templates/{id: PASS - Links template to membership type, unlinks existing
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/certificate-templates/by-: PASS - Returns template linked to plan, 404 if none
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/certificate-templates/{i: PASS - Returns PDF with text wrapping via Paragraph
backend_apis.Multi-line text content: PASS - Newlines preserved in content field

certificate_designer.link_plan_dropdown: PASS - Shows 5 options (Not Linked, Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, International)
certificate_designer.link_plan_functionality: PASS - Button text updates, toast shows, API called
certificate_designer.zoom_controls: PASS - +/- buttons and reset, displays percentage (78%)
certificate_designer.add_text_button: PASS - Adds new text element with 'New Text' content
certificate_designer.add_placeholder_button: PASS - Shows dropdown with 17 placeholder options
certificate_designer.canvas: PASS - Renders all 8 elements with proper styling
certificate_designer.properties_panel_text: PASS - Shows textarea for content, opacity slider, font controls, style toggles
certificate_designer.properties_panel_placeholder: PASS - Shows Dynamic Field dropdown, opacity slider, font controls
certificate_designer.bold_italic_underline: PASS - Toggle buttons for text styling

certificates_list.template_cards: PASS - Edit, Preview, Generate, Clone, Delete buttons
